understanding.goal_understanding: Progress through levels by placing every selectable piece onto a corresponding goal tile marked '+'; all goals must be simultaneously occupied by pieces to win a level and the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Pieces can be selected (likely by clicking their position). CLICK [x,y] attempts to move the selected piece directly to [x,y] if path is clear/unblocked, otherwise no movement. Directional actions like MOVE_RIGHT shift the piece one step in that direction if possible. Walls, obstacles block movement; repeated invalid clicks waste steps without progress. Finite step budget per level.
